title: How Your Clothes Shape Your Mind
subtitle: 穿衣如何影响你的行为

paragraphs.en: We all take a little extra effort to look nice for special occasions. But most of us have conflicting feelings about dressing up and feel guilty about taking the time to focus on clothes. Science now suggests the right dress may give ourselves the extra edge in our professional and personal lives. We hear sayings like 'dress for the job you want, not the job you have'. Most people don't really believe in them, but research into the impact of clothes on behavior now suggests that there may actually be a grain of truth in these sayings.
paragraphs.zh: 我们都会在特殊场合多花些心思打扮自己。但大多数人对精心着装抱有矛盾心理，为花时间关注衣着而感到内疚。如今科学研究表明，合适的着装或许能为我们的职业和个人生活增添额外优势。我们常听到“为你想要的工作而着装，而非现有的工作”这类说法。大多数人并不真信，但对服装影响行为的研究表明，这些说法或许确有几分道理。

paragraphs.en: Science says that the clothes we wear affect our behavior, our mood and even the way we interact with others because of the symbolic meaning that we assign to different types of clothing. We consider some clothes to be powerful, some to be fun, and so on. We even evaluate people whom we have just met based on their clothes. We also evaluate ourselves based on what we are wearing because of the way they make us feel. This means that the experience of wearing something affects our attitudes and our choice of behavior.
paragraphs.zh: 科学表明，我们穿的衣服会影响我们的行为、情绪乃至与他人的互动方式，因为我们赋予不同类型的服装以象征意义。我们认为某些衣服有力量感，某些则有趣味性，等等。我们甚至根据衣着评价刚认识的人。我们也会根据穿着评价自己，因为衣服带来的感受会影响自我认知。这意味着穿着体验会影响我们的态度和行为选择。

paragraphs.en: There's a reason tailored jackets are associated with being dressed for success. It seems that wearing formal office wear puts us in the right frame of mind to conduct business. Wearing power clothing makes us feel more confident and even increases hormones needed for displaying dominance. This in turn helps us become better negotiators and abstract thinkers. While a good suit works wonders for our performance in the boardroom, wearing formal wear isn't a great idea when we want to socialize.
paragraphs.zh: 定制西装与“为成功而着装”联系在一起是有原因的。穿着正式办公服似乎能让我们进入恰当的工作心态。穿上“权力着装”让我们感觉更自信，甚至会增加展现主导地位所需的激素水平。这反过来有助于我们成为更好的谈判者和抽象思考者。虽然一套好西装能在会议室里创造奇迹，但当我们想社交时，穿正装并非好主意。

paragraphs.en: Studies have found that people tend to be less open and less able to relax when they wear formal clothes. On the other hand, a casual dress helps us become more friendly and creative. These findings support the idea of wearing business casuals on a Friday; since colleagues are most likely to take out time to socialize on the last work day of the week. I mean, who wants to hang out with people in their suits?
paragraphs.zh: 研究发现，人们穿正装时往往更封闭、更难放松。相反，休闲着装有助于我们变得更友好、更有创造力。这些发现支持了周五穿商务休闲装的做法；毕竟同事们最可能在一周的最后一个工作日抽出时间社交。毕竟，谁愿意和穿着西装的人一起闲逛呢？
